markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Breyta and GrowthX to align on goals, target audience, and content strategy for upcoming engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Breyta aims to reach 700K ARR for break-even, with 100K ARR as an initial milestone](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Primary target audience includes UX designers, product managers, and user researchers, with emerging segments in academia and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Content strategy will focus on programmatic opportunities, leveraging Breyta's product capabilities and user data](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Webflow CMS is used for the website, with a need for scalable templates to support content growth](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)

## Topics

### Company Goals and Metrics

  - [Primary goal: Reach 700K ARR for break-even, with 100K ARR as initial milestone](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [Current metrics: \~150 sign-ups per week, 5-6% conversion rate from ads](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Shifting from free model to 14-day free trial with $15/month starting plan](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [Launching general availability within two weeks, supported by micro-influencer outreach](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)

### Target Audience and Use Cases

  - [Core: UX designers, product managers, user researchers](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Emerging segments: Academia (lecturers, PhD students), marketers (packaging, pricing research)](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Diverse use cases: Competitive research, mystery shopping, sales enablement analysis](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Individual users from large organizations (e.g., universities) signing up with personal accounts](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

### Product Features and Functionality

  - [Two core functionalities: Project-based analysis and Research Repository](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2348.0)
  - [Transcription and video/audio analysis capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2348.0)
  - [AI-powered chat interface for querying across multiple files and data types](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2361.0)
  - [New update improves relevance for user researchers](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

### Content Strategy and Programmatic Opportunities

  - [Focus on creating use case pages and leveraging existing public data](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2192.0)
  - [Potential for creating a library of questions tagged by personas and industries](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2439.0)
  - [Explore opportunities for conference-specific content repositories](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2527.0)
  - [Utilize Breyta's product to generate tailored questions based on content](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2494.0)

### Website and Technical Setup

  - [Using Webflow as CMS](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)
  - [Need for scalable templates to support programmatic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2900.0)
  - [Potential to embed Breyta's chat functionality directly into web pages](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3006.0)

### Influencer Marketing

  - [Seeking micro-influencers in UX/product design space (10k+ followers)](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3475.0)
  - [Plans to sponsor influencers and leverage their networks](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Request for assistance in identifying relevant influencers across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3468.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to access shared documents and begin research](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Schedule 1-hour follow-up session to collaborate on content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3274.0)
  - [GrowthX to present initial content opportunities and prioritization in next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3274.0)
  - [Explore tools/methods for identifying micro-influencers in the UX/product design space](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3468.0)
  - [Chris to share additional documentation (tone of voice, personas, competitive research) via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/xS9o_snoYeiFkwBSiBesK48kmc7daRkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3374.0)
